default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the new GitHub workflow for submitting content contributions.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Workflow:** Use a GitHub fork to submit Pull Requests (PRs) directly to the main `FleetDM` repository. This replaces the old issue-based method.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Why:** The fork-based PR workflow is the standard for external contributors and enables Git diffs, which are essential for efficient content review.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [**Critical Step:** CC Brock, Irina, and John in every PR description to ensure they receive immediate notifications for review.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Sulaman will submit the first article via PR for review. Brock will investigate granting Sulaman limited org access to add marketing labels, which automates board placement.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Old Workflow Inefficient

  - [The previous method of pasting Markdown into GitHub issues was inefficient.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**Key Limitation:** It lacked Git diffs, making it impossible to track changes between content versions, which complicated the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

### Solution: Fork-Based Pull Request Workflow

  - [This new workflow is the standard for external contributors and is designed to bypass branch protection rules that would otherwise block direct commits.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
    1.  [**Fork:** Create a personal fork of the `FleetDM` repository. This is a one-time setup.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
    2.  [**Create File:** In the fork, navigate to the `articles/` folder and click "Add file."](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
    3.  [**Name File:** Use the convention `article-title-with-dashes.md`.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
    4.  [**Add Content:** Paste the article's Markdown text into the file.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
    5.  [**Commit & Create PR:** Commit the change. GitHub will automatically configure the PR to target the main `FleetDM` repository.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
    6.  [**Add Notifications:** In the PR description, CC Brock, Irina, and John to trigger notifications.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

### Optional: Automating Project Board Placement

  - [**Goal:** Automatically add new PRs to the "Help Marketing" project board for team visibility and assignment.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Mechanism:** This requires adding the "help marketing" label to the PR.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Access Issue:** Adding labels requires organization-level permissions, which Sulaman currently lacks.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Brock will investigate granting Sulaman limited access to the `fleet` organization, scoped only to the marketing project.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [**Interim Process:** Until access is granted, Brock, Irina, or John will manually add the labels and move PRs to the board.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sulaman:**](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
      - [Submit the first article as a PR to `FleetDM/articles/` using the new fork-based workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
      - [CC Brock, Irina, and John in the PR description.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
      - [After review, convert remaining articles from issues to PRs.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [**Brock:**](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [Investigate granting Sulaman limited, marketing-scoped access to the `fleet` organization.](https://fathom.video/share/1Ucp55ykFTpWaXTVRF-y_GPZ1gBsjPkV?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)

action_items.description: Ask Sam re: add Sulaman to Fleet org w/ limited Marketing Project access; if approved, add him
Convert 1 article issue to PR in FleetDM/articles; CC Brock, Irina, John; then notify Erik to review
